name: path_report.txt
text:
SURGICAL PATHOLOGY REPORT
Accession No: SP-26-04417        Reported: 2026-06-22

CLINICAL HISTORY: 54-year-old female, palpable mass,
left breast upper outer quadrant.

SPECIMEN: Left breast core biopsy.

DIAGNOSIS:
Invasive ductal carcinoma, grade 2.
Tumor size 1.4 cm. ER positive (90%), PR positive (40%),
HER2 negative.

COMMENT: Margins not assessed on this specimen.
Correlation with imaging is recommended.
